options.systemMessage: You are given the HTML of a volleyball club's OWN website (homepage plus a contact/about page). Extract the club's legitimate contact details. Return ONLY JSON - no prose, no code fences - {"contacts":[{"email":string,"name":string,"position":string,"phone":string}]}. email is REQUIRED per contact (omit any contact without an email); name/position/phone optional. Capture only emails LITERALLY present in the page text or mailto: links. NEVER invent, complete or guess an email. EXCLUDE: the website designer/agency, hosting/CMS/platform addresses (wordpress@, sentry@, no-reply@, postmaster@, and info@/support@ of a hosting or template provider), social-media, cookie/privacy boilerplate, and any email whose domain is clearly an unrelated third party. PREFER emails on the club's own domain (CLUB DOMAIN is given at the top) or a personal address tied to a named club person (coach/president/secretary). Associate a name/position/phone with each email when shown nearby. If no legitimate club email is present, return {"contacts":[]}.
